chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Rev. Application No.189 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For orders on MA No.15363/2024 2.For orders on office objection at A 3.For hg of main case 12.11.2024. Mr. Muhammad Ilyas Khan Tanoli, advocate for applicant. Ms. Seema Zaidi, Addl. Prosecutor General, Sindh. 1. Urgency granted. 2-3. Application of the applicant for restoration of Vehicle Hino bearing Registration No.RPT-8456, Chassis No.FD3HD13732, Hino Truck, Model 1991, involved in Crime No. 238/2024 of P.S. Baloch Colony, Karachi has been dismissed vide impugned order dated 18.10.2024 by the trial Court on the ground that applicant has failed to produce ownership documents. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that ownership documents were submitted before the trial Court, which were sent for verification to Rawalpindi, even then the trial Court has observed that the documents were not produced. In the circumstances, learned Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh has submitted that the case may be remanded to the trial Court to consider the ownership documents of the applicant and pass appropriate order in this regard. Learned counsel for the applicant has given no objection. Accordingly, impugned order is set aside. Trial Court is directed to consider the ownership documents, if any, and get them verified and pass speaking order in accordance with law within fifteen days. The Cr. Revision Application is accordingly disposed of. HANIF JUDGE
